reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify the racing organization for which British race car driver Alex Lynn is a reserve driver.
2. Determine the full name of the Virgin Group-owned electric racing organization and return it.
original_final_question: What is the electric racing series British race car driver Alex Lynn drives for and is owned by Virgin Group? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which Formula E team is Alex Lynn a reserve driver for? Evidence: Alex Lynn: Alexander George Lynn (born 17 September 1993) is a British racing driver, who is currently DS Virgin Racing reserve driver in Formula E and G-Drive Racing full-time driver in the 2017 FIA World Endurance Championship. -> DS Virgin Racing

Node 2: What is the full name of the Virgin Group-owned Formula E team? Evidence: DS Virgin Racing: The DS Virgin Racing Formula E Team is a British motor racing team under ownership of Virgin Group that competes in the electric racing series, Formula E. -> DS Virgin Racing Formula E Team
Final answer: DS Virgin Racing Formula E Team
